title: Fluffy Kenyan Ugali Porridge
description: A comforting, peppery, and fluffy Kenyan dish perfect for a sick day or a quick breakfast.
instructions: Grate the onion using a box grater or a food processor.
Heat the ghee or oil in a pressure cooker over medium heat.
Add the grated onion and sauté until lightly browned.
Add the maize meal and stir to coat the grains with oil.
Gradually add the water, stirring continuously to prevent lumps.
Add the turmeric powder, salt, and black pepper. Stir well.
Close the pressure cooker and cook for 10 minutes.
Open the cooker and stir the porridge to fluff it up.
Cook for an additional 5 minutes or until the porridge is creamy and fluffy.
Serve hot with a pat of ghee or oil, if desired.
